positive: A symmetrical, repeating pattern of stylized celestial bodies and abstract constellations, forming a clean, high-contrast silhouette print. The main subjects include crescent moons, geometric star bursts, and elegant, flowing nebula shapes. The color palette is limited to deep indigo blue, metallic gold, and matte cream on a single background color. Style should be neo-art deco mixed with ethereal scientific illustration, ensuring sharp lines and distinct separation between elements. Central composition, highly detailed yet uncluttered, suitable for repeat apparel printing. Studio lighting, perfect graphic quality, vector art look.
negative: blurry, noisy, jpeg artifacts, grainy, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, smudge, dirty, poor anatomy, abstract chaos, gradient wash
